'''Sniquux''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] in the employ of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] who was tasked with the mission of killing all the [[t'landa Til]] priests that resided in [[Colony Nine]] of [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]. He accomplished this by stringing monofilament wire around the courtyard where several priests and their mates were taking a stroll, then triggering an ancient recording of a [[thota]], a predatory creature from the t'landa Til's homeworld of [[Varl/Legends|Varl]]. The priests panicked and stampeded right into the trap where they were dismembered by the almost invisible monofilament wires. Among the priests killed was the head Sacredot [[Tarrz]]. Sniquux was one of many mercenaries and assassins that would prepare the way for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] invasion known as the [[Battle of Ylesia]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
